name: FIRST COMMUNITY CORP /SC/
business: First Community Corporation is a bank holding company that, through its subsidiary First Community Bank, provides commercial and retail banking services to small-to-medium sized businesses, professionals, and individuals in South Carolina and Georgia, including loan and deposit products, mortgage, brokerage, investment, and insurance services.

exposures.sentence: The development and use of AI by us or our third-party vendors poses significant risks.
System or infrastructure failures, including cyber-attacks, could disrupt our operations, lead to the disclosure of confidential information, harm our reputation, or increase costs and losses.

Technology has lowered barriers to entry and made it possible for banks to offer products and services in more areas in which they do not have a physical location and for non-bank such as FinTech companies, to offer products and services traditionally provided by banks.
